emails.subject: Talent Review Meeting
emails.body: Please attend a Talent Review Meeting on Tuesday, November 19. Details... Tuesday, November 19 8:00 11:00 a.m. ECS 04075 Thanks, Tina Spiller Assistant to Greg Piper President CEO Enron Net Works LLC Phone 713.853.5746 Fax 713.646.8070

emails.subject: RE: Talent Review Meeting
emails.body: RE: Talent Review Meeting November 20. Sorry for the confusion. TS

emails.subject: RE: Talent Review Meeting
emails.body: Let's hold this time and date for now to have the review as a group. We may not need all morning to do a review like this but we may also need to meet on some other things as well. Thanks to everyone for all the work done and being done during this difficult time. Greg Piper

emails.subject: RE: Talent Review Meeting
emails.body: RE: Talent Review Meeting This meeting is canceled for tomorrow. Depending on the results of the 5:00 p.m. meeting today, there is a possibility that a shorter meeting will be scheduled for tomorrow. We will keep you posted. Thanks, Tina

emails.subject: RE: Talent Review Meeting
emails.body: Clarification the 5:00 p.m. meeting is canceled for today. TS
